from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
from vert_profile import compute_fields
from phyto_sibciom import plot_field_from_click, run_phyto_sibciom

# =========================
# AW / run.ipynb config
# =========================
AW_MODE = "mmol_m3"
MMOL_BASIS = "C"
AW_MG_C_PER_CELL = 2726e-9
MG_C_PER_MMOL_C = 12.011
N_PER_C_MOLAR = 16.0 / 106.0
AW_YEAR = 2018
AW_MONTH = 9
AW_DAY = 15
AW_LEVEL = 0
AW_NLEV = 12
AW_INITIAL_I = 118
AW_INITIAL_J = 107


# =========================
# SibCIOM sal config
# =========================
DATA_DIR = Path("/media/dina/data4tb/SibCIOM/Test/bio_exp/npzd_20_03_2026/ocn")
VAR_NAME = "sal"
SNAP_YEAR = 2012
SNAP_MONTH = AW_MONTH 
MAP_DEPTH_INDEX = 0
PROFILE_NLEV = AW_NLEV 
INITIAL_I = AW_INITIAL_I
INITIAL_J = AW_INITIAL_J
DEPTH_DIM_NAME = "knd"
INSPECT_FILE = False
In [3]:
# Aw phytoplankton
result = compute_fields(year=AW_YEAR, month=AW_MONTH, day=AW_DAY)
aw_cells = result["Aw"]

if AW_MODE == "cells_m3":
    aw_plot = aw_cells
    value_name = "Aw phytoplankton"
    value_units = "cells/m3"
elif AW_MODE == "mmol_m3":
    aw_mmol_c = aw_cells * AW_MG_C_PER_CELL / MG_C_PER_MMOL_C
    if MMOL_BASIS == "C":
        aw_plot = aw_mmol_c
        value_name = "Aw phytoplankton"
        value_units = "mmolC/m3"
    elif MMOL_BASIS == "N":
        aw_plot = aw_mmol_c * N_PER_C_MOLAR
        value_name = "Aw phytoplankton"
        value_units = "mmolN/m3"
    else:
        raise ValueError("MMOL_BASIS должен быть 'C' или 'N'")
else:
    raise ValueError("AW_MODE должен быть 'mmol_m3' или 'cells_m3'")

aw_plot_masked = np.where(result["mask"][:, :, None] != 0, aw_plot, np.nan)
aw_volume = np.transpose(aw_plot_masked, (2, 1, 0))

In [4]:
# sal from SibCIOM monthly NetCDF
INITIAL_I = AW_INITIAL_I 
INITIAL_J = AW_INITIAL_J

aw_i, aw_j = plot_field_from_click(
    volume=aw_volume,
    depth=np.asarray(result["z"], dtype=np.float64),
    year=AW_YEAR,
    month=AW_MONTH,
    depth_index=AW_LEVEL,
    profile_nlev=AW_NLEV,
    i=AW_INITIAL_I,
    j=AW_INITIAL_J,
    value_name=value_name,
    value_units=value_units,
    depth_name="z, m",
    x_name="i",
    y_name="j",
)


sal_i, sal_j, sal_prepared = run_phyto_sibciom(
    data_dir=DATA_DIR,
    year=SNAP_YEAR,
    month=SNAP_MONTH,
    var_name=VAR_NAME,
    depth_dim_name=DEPTH_DIM_NAME,
    map_depth_index=MAP_DEPTH_INDEX,
    profile_nlev=PROFILE_NLEV,
    initial_i=INITIAL_I,
    initial_j=INITIAL_J,
    inspect_file_flag=INSPECT_FILE,
)
